helpful: The provisioned full petition included the lower-court opinions and exposed the vehicle issues.
Fee-class, originating-circuit, relist, and CVSG base rates supported calibrated probability selection.
CourtListener opinion search tested whether the asserted Rule 54 conflict extended beyond the petition's characterization.
gaps: The SCOTUS corpus query surface lacks issue-level metadata for retrieving genuinely similar procedural-cost petitions.
notes: The provisioned inputs were complete for a petition-only posture; respondents had waived a response, so no BIO was expected.
